name: Leomer Romero
title: Senior Full Stack Engineer
subtitle: I build scalable web applications, cloud-native platforms, and AI-powered digital products using modern full stack technologies.
availability: Open to remote full stack roles with international teams
heroImageAlt: Leomer Romero, Senior Full Stack Engineer
about: I'm a Senior Full Stack Engineer with 10+ years of experience building production web applications across telecom, SaaS, and enterprise platforms. I work across the stack — from React and Next.js frontends to Node.js, PHP/Laravel, and Python backends — with a focus on performance, reliability, and clean API design.

My recent work includes real-time data systems with WebSockets and Apache Kafka, cloud deployments on AWS and Azure, and AI-powered features using LLM integrations and workflow automation. I care about shipping maintainable code, improving developer experience, and building products that scale.
I'm looking for remote opportunities where I can contribute hands-on full stack development on modern, high-impact products.
